description_long: This is a single athletic shoe designed for urban use, featuring a vibrant red mesh upper with a prominent white Nike Swoosh logo on both sides. The shoe has a white, textured foam sole that provides cushioning and grip, and a Velcro strap across the top for secure fastening. The upper material appears breathable and lightweight, with subtle perforations near the toe area for ventilation. The heel and tongue are padded for comfort, and the interior is lined with soft fabric. The overall silhouette is sleek and modern, suitable for running or casual wear in city environments.
description: A red athletic shoe with a white foam sole, Velcro strap, and prominent Nike Swoosh logos, designed for comfort and urban activity.
description_view_0: Side view showing the red mesh upper, white Nike Swoosh, Velcro strap, and textured white sole.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded toe, central Velcro strap, and mesh texture.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a smaller white Swoosh and visible heel padding.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the padded heel collar and the width of the white sole.
attribute_logo: White Nike Swoosh on both sides of the shoe
attribute_lacing_style: Velcro strap with standard eyelets for optional laces
